mechanism: System invokes learned heuristics on paired stimuli in comparison: perception of unified entity triggers integrated evaluation mechanism over dimension-wise decomposition; output preference rank determined by composite assessment versus attribute summation. Process involves reference frame establishment, stimulus encoding as monadic versus decomposed, and preference computation via holistic or itemized pathways.

Parse word stream incrementally; build syntactic structure online; when quantified determiner appears, linguistic system applies covert displacement operation creating indexed trace; downstream anaphoric gap triggered by ellipsis marker queues resolution process; when quantifier and ellipsis co-occur, single unified movement operation satisfies both constraints; processing cost reflects interaction between operation frequency and complexity.

Respondent confronted with objective visual evidence; forms or retrieves belief about factual state; when belief conflicts with political identity, reports incorrect answer intentionally as signal of partisan allegiance; reporting behavior modulated by contextual salience of controversy and voter engagement level.

Assign random outcome probabilities to subject; subject forms expectation about possession state; if planning to retain item, reference point equals status quo; if planning to trade, reference point is probabilistic distribution over outcomes; subject compares actual consumption utility against reference utility accounting for gain-loss asymmetry; choice reflects integration of consumption value and deviation cost.

Assign subject position in rank distribution; calculate rank-dependent utility combining absolute payoff and ordinal status; present binary choice between risky gamble enabling rank escape versus safe payment; player chooses option maximizing expected rank-sensitive utility; process repeats with re-randomized positions.

Extract option prices across strike space and time horizons; compute risk-neutral expectation of quadratic variation via portfolio replication without parametric model; collect intraday asset price samples at uniform frequency; sum squared returns over sampling interval; compute difference between ex-ante and ex-post variance measures; regress future returns on premium.
